name: The Ramco Cements Limited
summary: The Ramco Cements Limited manufactures and sells cement and cementious materials in India. It offers Portland Pozzolana, OPC, sulphate resisting, sleeper grade, and rapid hardening Portland cement, as well as ready mix concrete and dry mortar products under the RAMCO brand. The company is also involved in the generation and sale of electricity from wind mills and thermal power plants. As of March 31, 2019, it operated a wind farm with an installed capacity of 125.95 MW comprising 108 wind electric generators. The Ramco Cements Limited also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Madras Cements Ltd. and changed its name to The Ramco Cements Limited in July 2013. The Ramco Cements Limited was incorporated in 1957 and is headquartered in Chennai, India.
